name: USG Corporation
description: USG Corporation, also known as United States Gypsum Corporation, is an American company that manufactures and distributes building materials worldwide. Headquartered in Chicago, Illinois, the company is a leading producer of construction materials, most notably drywall, joint compound, and ceiling systems. Its portfolio includes well-known brands such as Sheetrock, Durock, and Securock. USG provides essential gypsum and related products used to construct walls, ceilings, roofs, and floors for residential, commercial, and institutional buildings, maintaining a significant market presence as the largest manufacturer of gypsum products in North America.
